# trustbundle

Pack AI agent execution traces into verifiable bundles for audit, compliance, and incident investigation.

## CLI Commands

trustbundle init — Initialize .trustbundle/ configuration in the current directory.
trustbundle build <file...> — Build a TrustBundle from input files (JSONL or agentbond JSON).
trustbundle verify <bundle.json> — Verify bundle integrity by re-computing the SHA-256 digest.
trustbundle show <bundle.json> — Display a human-readable summary of a bundle.

## Library API

import { buildBundle, verifyBundle, canonicalize, computeDigest } from 'trustbundle';

buildBundle(events: BundleEvent[], options?: { runId?: string; description?: string }): TrustBundle
verifyBundle(bundle: TrustBundle): VerifyResult
canonicalize(events: BundleEvent[]): string
computeDigest(events: BundleEvent[]): BundleDigest

## Adapters

jsonlAdapter.parse(input: string): Promise<BundleEvent[]> — Parse line-delimited JSON.
agentbondAdapter.parse(input: string): Promise<BundleEvent[]> — Parse agentbond AuditRecord[] JSON.

## Core Types

BundleEvent — Normalized event unit (id, source, type, timestamp, payload, metadata?).
TrustBundle — Bundle container (bundle_id, schema_version, events, event_count, digest).
VerifyResult — Verification outcome (valid, bundle_id, reason?).
BundleAdapter — Adapter interface (source, parse, validate).
